---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or mechanic for the simulation
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what experience does it improve? Why would this make Emoji Life better?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe how the feature should work. Be as specific as you can — what triggers it, what it does, how it ends.

## Affected Domains

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Agent (behavior, decision-making, personality)
- [ ] Faction (formation, membership, diplomacy)
- [ ] World / Grid (terrain, resources, spatial logic)
- [ ] Actions (new or modified agent actions)
- [ ] Rendering (visuals, canvas, camera)
- [ ] UI (inspector, event log, controls)
- [ ] Persistence (save/load)
- [ ] Simulation loop (tick timing, update order)

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or examples from similar simulations.
